# Epic PRD Template

**Purpose:** Define the epic — the highest-level product initiative with business goals, success metrics, scope, and stakeholders.

---

## Epic: [Epic Name]

**ID:** EPIC-XXX  
**Status:** Draft / Active / Complete / Archived  
**Owner:** [Product Owner / PM]  
**Created:** YYYY-MM-DD  
**Target Date:** YYYY-MM-DD  

---

### 1. Vision & Business Goals

| Goal | Description | Success Metric | Target |
|------|-------------|----------------|--------|
| G1 | [Primary business outcome] | [KPI] | [Value] |
| G2 | [Secondary outcome] | [KPI] | [Value] |
| G3 | [Tertiary outcome] | [KPI] | [Value] |

---

### 2. Scope

#### In Scope
- [Feature area 1]
- [Feature area 2]
- [Platform/integration 1]

#### Out of Scope
- [Explicitly excluded item 1]
- [Explicitly excluded item 2]
- [Future phase items]

---

### 3. Success Metrics (KPIs)

| Metric | Baseline | Target | Measurement Method |
|--------|----------|--------|-------------------|
| [Metric 1] | [Current] | [Target] | [How measured] |
| [Metric 2] | [Current] | [Target] | [How measured] |
| [Metric 3] | [Current] | [Target] | [How measured] |

---

### 4. Stakeholders

| Role | Name | Contact | Responsibility |
|------|------|---------|----------------|
| Product Owner | | | Epic ownership, prioritization |
| Engineering Lead | | | Technical feasibility, estimation |
| Design Lead | | | UX/UI, user research |
| QA Lead | | | Test strategy, quality gates |
| Security Reviewer | | | Threat model, compliance |
| [Other] | | | |

---

### 5. Dependencies & Risks

| Dependency | Owner | Status | Risk if Delayed |
|------------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| [Dep 1] | [Team/Person] | [Status] | [Impact] |
| [Dep 2] | [Team/Person] | [Status] | [Impact] |

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| [Risk 1] | High/Med/Low | High/Med/Low | [Action] |
| [Risk 2] | High/Med/Low | High/Med/Low | [Action] |

---

### 6. Timeline / Milestones

| Milestone | Target Date | Status | Notes |
|-----------|-------------|--------|-------|
| Epic Kickoff | | | |
| Feature Breakdown Complete | | | All PRDs drafted |
| Implementation Planning Complete | | | All plans approved |
| First Feature Delivery | | | |
| Epic Complete | | | All metrics achieved |

---

### 7. Communication Plan

- **Cadence:** [Weekly / Bi-weekly]
- **Channels:** [Slack channel, Confluence, Notion]
- **Audience:** [Team, Stakeholders, Leadership]

---

## Approval

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|------|------|-----------|------|
| Product Owner | | | |
| Engineering Lead | | | |
| Design Lead | | | |

| Version | Date | Author | Changes |
